newsSince: On June 8-9, 2026 APi closed the Onyx-Fire Protection Services acquisition (~$190M annual revenue, inspection-first, asset-light, accretive) and raised 2026 guidance to net revenue $8.575-8.775B and adjusted EBITDA $1.165-1.225B. Management reiterates ~10-11% of 2026 revenue from the data-center end market. This is a directly on-thesis positive for a data-center-services lens.

sources.label: APi boosts 2026 outlook after Onyx-Fire acquisition

verdicts.rankRationale: On the latent under-covered AI supply-chain lens APG just delivered exactly the catalyst the thesis flagged: Onyx-Fire close (+~$190M, inspection-first, asset-light) and a raised 2026 guide, with ~10-11% revenue from data centers. Mandatory fire/life-safety inspection in dense data centers is under-screened, supporting an up move.
verdicts.bull: Accretive inspection-first M&A plus raised guide; ~10-11% revenue from data centers in an under-covered safety niche.
verdicts.neutral: Strong services franchise but only partly an AI-data-center pure play.
verdicts.bear: Modest YTD (+9%); data-center mix selective and tied to broader nondiscretionary services.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Onyx-Fire close + raised 2026 guidance; data-center inspection demand
verdicts.primaryRisk: Data-center exposure diluted within broad services portfolio
